recommendations.title: Rome, Open City
recommendations.overview: During the Nazi occupation of 1944 Rome, Resistance leader Giorgio Manfredi is pursued by the Nazis as he seeks refuge and a means of escape.

recommendations.title: Germany, Year Zero
recommendations.overview: In the ruins of post-WWII Berlin, a twelve-year-old boy is left to his own devices in order to help provide for his family.

recommendations.title: Stromboli
recommendations.overview: After the end of WWII, a young Lithuanian woman and a young Italian man from Stromboli impulsively marry, but married life on the island is more demanding than she can accept.

recommendations.title: Paisan
recommendations.overview: Six stories unfold in various regions, from Sicily to the northern Po Valley as American military personnel interact with a variety of Italian locals over eighteen months in the push north during the Italian Campaign of WWII as German forces retreat.

recommendations.title: Europa '51
recommendations.overview: A wealthy, self-absorbed Rome socialite is racked by guilt over the death of her young son. As a way of dealing with her grief and finding meaning in her life, she decides to devote her time and money to the city’s poor and sick. Her newfound, single

recommendations.title: Ro.Go.Pa.G.
recommendations.overview: Four short films by four different directors dealing with the principles of modern life.
recommendations.director: Pier Paolo Pasolini, Jean-Luc Godard, Ugo Gregoretti, Roberto Rossellini

recommendations.title: Journey to Italy

recommendations.title: Come and See

recommendations.title: The General
recommendations.overview: During America’s Civil War, Union spies steal engineer Johnny Gray's beloved locomotive, 'The General'—with Johnnie's lady love aboard an attached boxcar—and he single-handedly must do all in his power to both get The General back and to rescue Annab

recommendations.title: Kagemusha
